### Figure 5. Pairwise drug synergy found in the prediction

#### Individual signatures

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

## Aggregated signatures' drug results
RAresult_aggrSig_RNAseq <- readRDS(here("results/figure4_synergy/RAresult_neg_left_0.9_aggrSig_TB_RNAseq.rds"))
RAresult_aggrSig_marray <- readRDS(here("results/figure4_synergy/RAresult_neg_left_0.9_aggrSig_TB_microarray.rds"))
predicted_aggr_drugs = union(RAresult_aggrSig_RNAseq, RAresult_aggrSig_marray) # 216 drugs
##Individual signatures' drug results
RAresult_indivSig_RNAseq <- readRDS(here("results/figure4_synergy/RAresult_indivSig_TB_RNAseq.rds"))
RAresult_indivSig_marray <- readRDS(here("results/figure4_synergy/RAresult_indivSig_TB_microarray.rds"))
predicted_indiv_drugs = union(RAresult_indivSig_RNAseq, RAresult_indivSig_marray) # 227 drugs ---- z-score the full distribution then select the drugs we care about (flip) |  the moas including all the drugs and see if the | similar perturbations were assumed | what fraction has high/low synergy | then plot for my drugs and see the distributions | more synergistic pairs or not? 
# overlapping drugs between aggr and indiv 's drug predictions
predicted_drugs = intersect(predicted_aggr_drugs,predicted_indiv_drugs) # 108 drugs

# list of Antitubercular Medications - ncbi.nlm.nih.gov (last updated June 2023)
tbmedications <- c("rifampin","isoniazid",
                   "pyrazinamide","ethambutol",
                   "kanamycin", "streptomycin",
                   "capreomycin", "amikacin",
                   "levofloxacin","moxifloxacin",
                   "gatifloxacin","bedaquiline",
                   "delamanid","linezolid",
                   "pretomanid"
                   ) # 15 drugs

predicted_drugs = union(predicted_drugs, tbmedications) # 108 + 15 = 123 drugs

drugs_synergy_df = read.csv(here("data/metadata/20240724DrugCombDB_Syner&Antag_voting.csv"))
drugs_synergy_df$Drug1 <- tolower(drugs_synergy_df$Drug1)
drugs_synergy_df$Drug2 <- tolower(drugs_synergy_df$Drug2)
predicted_drugs_synergy = filter(drugs_synergy_df, Drug1 %in% predicted_drugs, Drug2 %in% predicted_drugs)
# Z-score transform each synergy metric across all entries
synergy_z <- predicted_drugs_synergy %>%
  mutate(across(c(ZIP, Bliss, Loewe, HSA), ~as.numeric(scale(.)))) %>%
  mutate(combined_zscore = rowMeans(across(c(ZIP, Bliss, Loewe, HSA)))) %>%
  filter(Drug1 %in% predicted_drugs, Drug2 %in% predicted_drugs) %>%
  unite("drugcomb", Drug1:Drug2, sep = "+", remove = FALSE)
drugs_synergy_drugs = filter(synergy_z, Drug1 %in% predicted_drugs, Drug2 %in% predicted_drugs)

# Sort by combined z-score
synergy_z_sorted <- drugs_synergy_drugs %>%
  arrange(desc(combined_zscore))
```

```{r}
# Step 1: Duplicate with swapped Drug1 and Drug2
drug_df = synergy_z_sorted
drug_df_swapped <- drug_df %>%
  rename(Drug1_orig = Drug1, Drug2_orig = Drug2) %>%
  mutate(Drug1 = Drug2_orig, Drug2 = Drug1_orig) %>%
  select(Drug1, Drug2, everything())

# Step 2: Combine original and swapped
drug_df_full <- bind_rows(drug_df, drug_df_swapped)

# Step 3: Standardize drug pair (alphabetical order)
drug_df_full_std <- drug_df_full %>%
  mutate(
    DrugA = pmin(Drug1, Drug2),  # alphabetically first
    DrugB = pmax(Drug1, Drug2)   # alphabetically second
  )

# Step 4: Group by standardized pair and select highest synergy
# 37 drugs with synergy with another drug
final_drugcomb_df <- drug_df_full_std %>%
  group_by(DrugA, DrugB) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = combined_zscore, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(DrugA, DrugB, combined_zscore)

final_drugcomb_df2 = tibble(
  "DrugA" = final_drugcomb_df$DrugB,
  "DrugB" = final_drugcomb_df$DrugA,
  "combined_zscore" = final_drugcomb_df$combined_zscore
)

final_drugcomb_symm = rbind(final_drugcomb_df, final_drugcomb_df2)
```

```{r moa mapping}
drug_moa_df = read_csv(here("data/metadata/repurposing_drugs_20200324.csv"), skip=9)
# Map DrugA and DrugB
moa_mapped_df <- final_drugcomb_symm %>%
  left_join(drug_moa_df, by = c("DrugA" = "pert_iname")) %>%
  rename(MOA1 = moa) %>%
  left_join(drug_moa_df, by = c("DrugB" = "pert_iname")) %>%
  rename(MOA2 = moa)

moa_mapped_df_std <- moa_mapped_df %>%
  mutate(
    MOA_A = pmin(MOA1, MOA2),  # alphabetical order
    MOA_B = pmax(MOA1, MOA2)
  )

moa_pair_synergy <- moa_mapped_df_std %>%
  group_by(MOA_A, MOA_B) %>%
  summarise(mean_combined_zscore = mean(combined_zscore), .groups = "drop")

moa_pair_synergy2 = tibble(
  "MOA_A" = moa_pair_synergy$MOA_B,
  "MOA_B" = moa_pair_synergy$MOA_A,
  "mean_combined_zscore" = moa_pair_synergy$mean_combined_zscore
)

final_moa_pair_synergy = rbind(moa_pair_synergy, moa_pair_synergy2)
final_moa_pair_synergy$mean_combined_zscore = as.numeric(final_moa_pair_synergy$mean_combined_zscore)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Assuming your dataframe is called `final_moa_pair_synergy`

# Step 1: Expand MOA_B values (split by "|")
final_moa_pair_synergy_expanded <- final_moa_pair_synergy %>%
  mutate(
    MOA_A = str_replace_all(MOA_A, " *\\| *", "|"),
    MOA_B = str_replace_all(MOA_B, " *\\| *", "|")
  ) %>%
  separate_rows(MOA_A, sep = "\\|") %>%
  separate_rows(MOA_B, sep = "\\|")

# Step 2: (Optional) Remove self-pairs
final_moa_pair_synergy_expanded <- final_moa_pair_synergy_expanded %>%
  filter(MOA_A != MOA_B)

# Step 3: Duplicate to make symmetric
final_moa_pair_synergy_symm <- bind_rows(
  final_moa_pair_synergy_expanded,
  final_moa_pair_synergy_expanded %>%
    rename(MOA_temp = MOA_A, MOA_A = MOA_B) %>%
    rename(MOA_B = MOA_temp)
)

# Step 4: Re-aggregate in case expansion created duplicates
final_moa_pair_synergy_symm_avg <- final_moa_pair_synergy_symm %>%
  group_by(MOA_A, MOA_B) %>%
  summarise(score = mean(mean_combined_zscore), .groups = "drop")

# Step 5: Convert to matrix
moa_synergy_mat <- final_moa_pair_synergy_symm_avg %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = MOA_B,
    values_from = score,
    values_fill = list(score = 0)
  ) %>%
  column_to_rownames("MOA_A") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Get consistent MOA order (e.g., alphabetical or your own vector)
moa_order <- sort(unique(c(final_moa_pair_synergy_symm_avg$MOA_A,
                           final_moa_pair_synergy_symm_avg$MOA_B)))

# Reorder rows and columns of matrix
moa_synergy_mat <- moa_synergy_mat[moa_order, moa_order]

# Make a copy of the matrix
moa_synergy_upper <- moa_synergy_mat

# Set lower triangle (including diagonal) to NA
moa_synergy_upper[lower.tri(moa_synergy_upper, diag = TRUE)] <- NA
```

```{r MOA synergy heatmap | full}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(tidyverse) # Added for string manipulation and filtering

# same drugs as above but now categorized -- defined by NIH
first_line_drugs <- c("rifampin", "isoniazid", "pyrazinamide", "ethambutol")
second_line_drugs <- c("kanamycin", "streptomycin", "capreomycin", "amikacin", 
                       "levofloxacin", "moxifloxacin", "gatifloxacin")
mdr_tb_drugs <- c("bedaquiline", "delamanid", "linezolid", "pretomanid")

# Get the MOAs for each drug category from 'drug_moa_df'
# This function helps split MOAs that are joined by "|"
get_unique_moas <- function(drug_list, moa_df) {
  moa_df %>%
    filter(pert_iname %in% drug_list) %>%
    pull(moa) %>%
    str_split("\\|") %>%
    unlist() %>%
    str_trim() %>%
    unique()
}

first_line_moas <- get_unique_moas(first_line_drugs, drug_moa_df)
second_line_moas <- get_unique_moas(second_line_drugs, drug_moa_df)
mdr_tb_moas <- get_unique_moas(mdr_tb_drugs, drug_moa_df)

# labels with asterisks for visualization
current_labels <- rownames(moa_synergy_mat)

new_labels <- tibble(moa = current_labels) %>%
  mutate(
    new_label = case_when( # if MOA are associated with new drugs tag with * based on class
      moa %in% mdr_tb_moas    ~ paste0(moa, "***"),
      moa %in% second_line_moas ~ paste0(moa, "**"),
      moa %in% first_line_moas  ~ paste0(moa, "*"),
      TRUE                      ~ moa # No asterisk in the NIH identified TB
    )
  ) %>%
  pull(new_label)

# Apply the new labels to your matrix
rownames(moa_synergy_mat) <- new_labels
colnames(moa_synergy_mat) <- new_labels

# Define color function
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(-0.18, 0, 0.22),
  c("firebrick3", "white", "dodgerblue3")
)

# Create the custom legend for the asterisks
asterisk_legend <- Legend(
  labels = c("* First Line", "** Second Line", "*** MDR-TB"),
  title = "TB Medication MOA",
  type = "points", # Use 'points' or 'lines' as placeholders
  pch = NA_integer_ # Hide the placeholder symbol
)


# Define the output file path
pdf(file = here("figures/withnewdrugs_Figure4_MOA_synnergy_heatmap_full_zscore.pdf"), width = 25, height = 25)

# Generate Heatmap for MOA Synergy (no changes to this part)
ht <- Heatmap(
  moa_synergy_mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = TRUE,
  name = "Combined synergy \n z-score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_names_rot = 45,
  column_names_side = "top",
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  na_col = "white",
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 12)
  ),
  width = unit(30, "cm"),
  height = unit(30, "cm")
)

# Draw the heatmap AND the custom legend
# The 'annotation_legend_list' argument adds new legend
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_list = list(asterisk_legend))

# Close the PDF device
dev.off()
```

```{r Verification Table: TB Drugs to MOAs } 

# Create a single dataframe with all TB drugs and their categories
tb_drug_categories_df <- bind_rows(
  tibble(pert_iname = first_line_drugs, category = "First Line (*)"),
  tibble(pert_iname = second_line_drugs, category = "Second Line (**)"),
  tibble(pert_iname = mdr_tb_drugs, category = "MDR-TB (***)")
)

# Join with the main MOA dataframe to find the MOA for each drug
verification_table <- tb_drug_categories_df %>%
  left_join(drug_moa_df, by = "pert_iname") %>%
  select(Category = category, Drug = pert_iname, MOA = moa) %>%
  arrange(Category, Drug) # Sort for clarity

print(verification_table)
```
